praty-ava-√ruh P. -rohati, to come down again, descend from (abl.), alight upon (acc.),  TS. ;  Br. ;  ĀśvŚr. ;
to descend (from a seat, chariot &c.) in honour of (acc.),  TS. ;  ŚBr. ;  MBh. ;
to celebrate the festival called Pratyavarohaṇa,  ŚāṅkhGṛ.  :
Caus. -ropayati, to bring down from, deprive of (abl. or instr.),  MBh.
